mainEntity.name: What if mental health injury from workplace trauma in Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: What if mental health injury from workplace trauma in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah covers psychological injuries if result of physical trauma or extraordinary stress.

suggestedAnswer.text: Requires medical diagnosis, work causation. Harder to prove; psychiatrist reports key. Insurers deny as pre-existing; appeals succeed with evidence.

name: Mental Health Claims in Utah Workers' Comp
description: Utah covers psychological injuries if result of physical trauma or extraordinary stress.
